description_long: This is a low-top sneaker featuring a mix of black, beige, and cream tones with a distinctive paisley and plaid pattern on the upper. The shoe has a prominent light pink Nike Swoosh on the side and a beige heel tab with the word 'NIKE' embroidered in white. The laces are thick and white, showing signs of wear and fraying, while the toe box and midsole display visible scuff marks and discoloration. The outsole is a yellowed rubber, indicating age and use, and the overall structure appears slightly creased and worn. The shoe's design and branding suggest it is a Nike Dunk model, likely a special or collaborative edition.
description: A worn, patterned Nike low-top sneaker with a pink Swoosh, beige heel tab, and thick white laces, showing visible signs of use and discoloration.
description_view_0: Side view showing the pink Nike Swoosh, paisley and plaid upper, and scuffed toe box.
description_view_1: Rear view highlighting the beige heel tab with white 'NIKE' embroidery and the yellowed outsole.
description_view_2: Opposite side view with a black Swoosh, plaid and paisley patterns, and visible wear on the midsole.
description_view_3: Front view displaying the thick, frayed white laces, worn toe box, and patterned upper.
attribute_logo: White 'NIKE' text embroidered on the beige heel tab; pink Nike Swoosh on the side panels.
